items.label: Journal for ImmunoTherapy of Cancer • 2021
items.title: GraphITE: Unsupervised Graph Embeddings for Multiplex Immunofluorescence Image Exploration
items.description: Developed an unsupervised graph embedding framework for interactive exploration and visualization of multiplex immunofluorescence images.

items.label: bioRxiv • 2021
items.title: Image Model Embeddings for Digital Pathology and Drug Development via Self-Supervised Learning
items.description: Proposed self-supervised image representation learning for pathology images to support downstream tasks in drug discovery and development.

items.label: bioRxiv • 2021
items.title: An Unsupervised Graph Embeddings Approach to Multiplex Immunofluorescence Image Exploration
items.description: Early version of GraphITE: unsupervised graph embeddings for exploring multiplex immunofluorescence images.

items.label: American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) • 2024
items.title: Fast, Interactive, AI-Assisted 3D Lung Tumor Segmentation
items.description: Presented a fast, interactive AI-assisted 3D lung tumor segmentation approach for clinical CT imaging.

items.label: American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) • 2023
items.title: Improving Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Segmentation on a Challenging Dataset
items.description: Presented segmentation methods that improved performance on challenging non-small cell lung cancer cohorts.

items.label: American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) • 2021
items.title: Leveraging Graphs to Do Hypothesis & Data-Driven Research Using Multiplex Immunofluorescence Images
items.description: Presented graph-based methods for hypothesis- and data-driven research using multiplex immunofluorescence images.

items.title: Transformative AI and single-cell technologies revolutionizing healthcare
items.description: Explored how foundation models and single-cell technologies are reshaping precision medicine and accelerating therapeutic discovery.

items.title: AI-driven identification of drug-tolerant persister cells in lung cancer
items.description: A novel framework combining single-cell transcriptomics and machine learning to detect treatment-resistant persister cell populations.
